chapter_title.en: Chapter 37 – Earnings of the female singer and her procurement

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/81)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/81)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ الْمُغَنِّيَةُ مَلْعُونَةٌ مَلْعُونٌ مَنْ أَكَلَ كَسْبَهَا .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashsary, from Al Hassan Biin Ali, from Is’haq Bin Ibrahim, from Nasr Bin Qabous who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The female singer is an accursed woman, and accursed is the one who consumes her earnings’.
en.sarwar: 6. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Ishaq ibn Ibrahim from Nasr ibn Qabus who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘A singer female is condemned, and condemned is one who consumes the income from her singing.’”
